description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named documentation that runs on push to the devel branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should build and deploy documentation using Python 3.12 on an ubuntu-latest environment. It should have concurrent execution with cancel-in-progress set to true. The workflow consists of three jobs: build, test, and deploy. The build job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, builds Sphinx venv and documentation, and uploads artifacts. The test job runs after build, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs linkcheck and markdownlint-cli2-action. The deploy job runs after test, downloads artifacts, and deploys to GitHub Pages if the push event is on the devel branch of a specific repository.
